{{CargoRelic
|name=Stone Skin Scroll
|class_id=20220
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=After activating this spell, you obtain a rock shell that can absorb up to 1,000 DMG, lasting 40 seconds and reflecting damage. Note: The effect is halved on the summoned creatures!
|fame=11
|art=18
|fth=31
|civ=12
|tech=18
|ss1=Per 4 Novice Scrolls opened, Snail DEF +1<br>Novice Scrolls opened: 120/120
|ss2=Per 4 Novice Scrolls opened, Snail DEF +2<br>Novice Scrolls opened: 120/120
|ss3=Per 4 Novice Scrolls opened, Snail DEF +3<br>Novice Scrolls opened: 120/120
|ss4=Per 4 Novice Scrolls opened, Snail DEF +3<br>Novice Scrolls opened: 120/120
|ss7=Per 4 Novice Scrolls opened, Snail DEF +3<br>Novice Scrolls opened: 120/120<br> (Awakened)
}}
